  • java.lang.Object
    • com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ResourceConsumptionCounter

    public final class ResourceConsumptionCounter
extends Object
implements IResourceConsumptionCounter
    Description of a resource counter of a 1C:Enterprise cluster
